summary: A client JS bundle changed and obfuscated internal parser exports, causing extraction code that depended on bundle internals to fail.

error.message: Cannot find exported parser after bundle changed; obfuscated _0x symbols and eval( markers observed
error.stack:
Error: cannot find exported parser
    at evaluateBundleParser

safety.redaction_notes: Bundle content is represented only by generic markers. No proprietary script is included.
